sentences.arabic: تَعْمَلُ مَرْوَةُ كَاتِبَةً فِي مَكْتَبِ الْبَلَدِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Merwa radi kao sekretarica u opštinskom uredu.
sentences.translationEn: Marwa works as a secretary in the municipality office.

sentences.arabic: تَسْتَقْبِلُ الْمُرَاجِعِينَ وَتُوَجِّهُهُمْ إِلَى الْقِسْمِ الْمُنَاسِبِ.
sentences.translation: Prima stranke i upućuje ih u odgovarajući odjel.
sentences.translationEn: She receives visitors and directs them to the right department.

sentences.arabic: تُجِيبُ عَنِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ بِصَبْرٍ وَتَشْرَحُ الْإِجْرَاءَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Strpljivo odgovara na pitanja i objašnjava procedure.
sentences.translationEn: She answers questions with patience and explains procedures.

sentences.arabic: يَخْرُجُ النَّاسُ رَاضِينَ لِأَنَّهَا تُسَاعِدُهُمْ بِشَكْلٍ جَيِّدٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi izlaze zadovoljni jer im ona dobro pomaže.
sentences.translationEn: People leave satisfied because she helps them well.
